CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-04-2026 Continued To Jul-22-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-04-2026 Continued To May-20-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Amendment To Complaint Naming Corrine Zaracotas, Administrator Of The Estate Of Timoleon Zaracotas, Deceased; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of J Niley Dorit; Order
Off Calendar Jan-20-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Bettina Schneider's Motion for Leave to File Amendment to Complaint Naming Corrine Zaracotas, Administrator of the Estate of Timoleon Zaracotas, Deceased, is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, the court grants Plaintiff leave to file an amendment to her complaint to add Corrine Zaracotas, Administrator of the Estate of Timoleon Zaracotas, as a defendant.

Plaintiff must file her amendment to the complaint forthwith but no later than February 3, 2026.

Moving Party is ordered to prepare a proposed order containing the above text verbatim and email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the time set for hearing.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
